auth.signInSubtitle: Track your income, expenses, and investments in one place.
auth.lockedTitle: Sign in to save your data
auth.lockedSubtitle: You can see how this works, but you'll need to sign in with Google before you can save or edit anything.
auth.lockedTitleFeature: Sign up to unlock this tool
auth.lockedSubtitleFeature: Fixed Deposit and Compound Interest are free to try. Sign in with Google to unlock every calculator and the ledger.

dashboard.title: Monthly Ledger
dashboard.rolloverNotice: New month detected — {{amount}} carried over from {{month}}.

fixedDeposit.subtitle: Simple interest on a lump-sum deposit

compoundInterest.subtitle: Future value with recurring monthly deposits

profitMargin.title: Net Profit Margin
profitMargin.subtitle: Profitability as a percentage of revenue

npv.title: Net Present Value (NPV)
npv.subtitle: Discounted cash flow analysis
npv.verdictPositive: Positive NPV — the investment is expected to add value.
npv.verdictNegative: Negative NPV — the investment is expected to destroy value.

opportunityCost.title: Opportunity Cost Matrix
opportunityCost.subtitle: Compare what you chose against what you gave up
opportunityCost.verdictChosenBetter: Your chosen option outperforms the alternative by {{amount}}.
opportunityCost.verdictForegoneBetter: The foregone option would have outperformed by {{amount}}.

admin.notAuthorized: You don't have access to this page.
admin.maintenanceModeDesc: When enabled, everyone except you sees a maintenance notice instead of the app. Use this while making changes or fixing something.

maintenance.title: Finma is under maintenance
maintenance.body: We're making some updates and will be back shortly. Thanks for your patience.
